title: Nootropic Stacking for Women Over 40: A Practical Safety Guide
author: Happy Aging Team
meta_description: Learn how to build a safe, effective nootropic stack for women over 40. Covers Lion's Mane, L-theanine, Bacopa, and a 7-step beginner protocol for brain fog and focus.
